title: Update Malicious Code Protection Mechanisms
description: Update malicious code protection mechanisms when new releases are available.

checks.name: Antivirus Signature Definitions Were Updated Within 24 Hours
checks.purpose: Verify antivirus or EDR signature definitions are no more than 24 hours old, confirming automatic updates are functioning

checks.name: Automatic Definition Updates are Enabled
checks.purpose: Confirm the antivirus or EDR solution is configured to automatically download and apply new definition updates without manual intervention

checks.name: Antivirus Engine Version is Current
checks.purpose: Verify the antivirus engine itself is on a current supported version and not an outdated release

checks.name: Antivirus Signature Definitions Were Updated Within 24 Hours
checks.purpose: Verify antivirus or EDR signature definitions are no more than 24 hours old on the server

checks.name: Automatic Definition Updates are Enabled
checks.purpose: Confirm the antivirus or EDR solution is configured to automatically download and apply new definition updates on the server

checks.name: Antivirus Engine Version is Current
checks.purpose: Verify the antivirus engine is on a current supported version on the server

checks.name: ClamAV or Equivalent Definitions Were Updated Within 24 Hours
checks.purpose: Verify ClamAV virus database files are no more than 24 hours old, confirming freshclam or equivalent is running

checks.name: Freshclam or Automatic Update Daemon is Running
checks.purpose: Confirm freshclam or the equivalent automatic definition update daemon is running and scheduled

checks.name: Rkhunter or Chkrootkit Database is Current
checks.purpose: Verify rkhunter or chkrootkit have been updated recently to include current rootkit detection signatures

checks.name: ClamAV Definitions Were Updated Within 24 Hours
checks.purpose: Verify ClamAV virus database files are no more than 24 hours old on Debian

checks.name: Freshclam Automatic Update Daemon is Running
checks.purpose: Confirm the freshclam service is running and scheduled for automatic definition updates on Debian

checks.name: Rkhunter or Chkrootkit Database is Current
checks.purpose: Verify rkhunter or chkrootkit have been updated recently on Debian

remediation: Configure Windows Defender or EDR to update definitions automatically at least daily. Verify definition age is within 24 hours. On Linux, enable and configure freshclam as a service and update rkhunter/chkrootkit databases via cron. Alert on definition update failures via the SIEM.
